title: AddressSanitizer: exceeds maximum supported size with Capnproto input
description:
### Describe the bug
https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?PR=90249&sha=2e2b14494a0c2f65ec5240c0e8562efb8244823c&name_0=PR&name_1=BuzzHouse%20%28arm_asan%29
### How to reproduce
Run under ASAN:
```
CREATE DATABASE d0;
CREATE DATABASE d3;
CREATE TABLE d3.`t5` (`c0` Decimal32(8) COMMENT '\\') ENGINE = SummingMergeTree() PRIMARY KEY (`c0`) SETTINGS add_minmax_index_for_string_columns = 1, min_bytes_for_full_part_storage = 1, allow_vertical_merges_from_compact_to_wide_parts = 1, ttl_only_drop_parts = 0, enable_block_offset_column = 1, min_bytes_for_wide_part = 1, enable_block_number_column = 1, allow_experimental_replacing_merge_with_cleanup = 1, allow_suspicious_indices = 1, index_granularity = 1, allow_coalescing_columns_in_partition_or_order_key = 1, allow_nullable_key = 1, allow_floating_point_partition_key = 1, vertical_merge_algorithm_min_bytes_to_activate = 0, add_minmax_index_for_numeric_columns = 1, enable_vertical_merge_algorithm = 1, use_const_adaptive_granularity = 0, allow_experimental_reverse_key = 1, allow_summing_columns_in_partition_or_order_key = 1;
CREATE TABLE d0.`t9` ENGINE = Buffer(d3, `t5`, 80, 128, 123, 202, 973, 415, 459, 55, 855) SETTINGS load_balancing_first_offset = 8, geo_distance_returns_float64_on_float64_arguments = 1, print_pretty_type_names = 1, shared_merge_tree_sync_parts_on_partition_operations = 0, send_progress_in_http_headers = 1, input_format_json_ignore_unnecessary_fields = 1, input_format_json_infer_incomplete_types_as_strings = 0, validate_experimental_and_suspicious_types_inside_nested_types = 1, parallel_replicas_min_number_of_rows_per_replica = 2097152, enable_software_prefetch_in_aggregation = 1, precise_float_parsing = 0, input_format_json_read_bools_as_numbers = 1, cast_string_to_variant_use_inference = 1, input_format_allow_seeks = 0, query_plan_merge_filter_into_join_condition = 0, throw_if_no_data_to_insert = 1, filesystem_prefetches_limit = 0, convert_query_to_cnf = 1, compile_expressions = 0, optimize_extract_common_expressions = 0, use_variant_as_common_type = 0, correlated_subqueries_default_join_kind = 'right', vector_search_filter_strategy = 'auto', throw_if_deduplication_in_dependent_materialized_views_enabled_with_async_insert = 0, join_on_disk_max_files_to_merge = 8, input_format_parallel_parsing = 1, query_plan_convert_outer_join_to_inner_join = 1, cross_to_inner_join_rewrite = 2, parallel_replicas_custom_key_range_upper = 8388608, output_format_arrow_low_cardinality_as_dictionary = 1, optimize_distributed_group_by_sharding_key = 1, query_plan_remove_redundant_sorting = 1, optimize_rewrite_sum_if_to_count_if = 0, query_plan_merge_expressions = 0, serialize_query_plan = 0, join_runtime_bloom_filter_bytes = 9034925, input_format_arrow_skip_columns_with_unsupported_types_in_schema_inference = 0, output_format_arrow_use_64_bit_indexes_for_dictionary = 1, input_format_tsv_use_best_effort_in_schema_inference = 1;

```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id INT UNSIGNED, value DECIMAL(8, 4), name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_db.test_table (id, value, name) VALUES (1, CAST('123.456' AS DECIMAL(8, 4)), 'Test1'), (2, CAST('-987.654' AS DECIMAL(8, 4)), 'Test2'), (3, CAST('0.0001' AS DECIMAL(8, 4)), 'Test3');
SELECT id, value, name FROM test_db.test_table WHERE value > CAST('100.0' AS DECIMAL(8, 4)) OR name IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Exceeds maximum supported size with Capnproto input
